// note: Copy this to .devcontainer/devcontainer.json at your repo root to use it with VS Code. The Dockerfile path is relative to that location.
name: aegis-sandbox
// network: VS Code bootstraps its server into the container over the network, so '--network none' is omitted here (it would break the connection). For hard network isolation, use the headless run.sh / run.ps1 wrapper instead, or route egress through an allowlist proxy.
